_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber defense laws and regulations
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific privacy regulations, with emphasis on the legal bases for processing, data subject rights, cross-border transfer mechanisms, and enforcement precedent.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Knowledge SP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-006 (SP, cosine: 0.522), RC-K-008 (RC, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.495). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, regulations]. NICE-only terms [cyber, defense, laws] vs WIDAI-only terms [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.906, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.063 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (60.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of cyber defense laws and regulations" and "Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.532 ≈ STS 0.495 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, regulations] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, regulations]. NICE-only: [cyber, defense, laws]. WIDAI-only: [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, data].
